status: Evidence Foundation Expanded — Preclinical-Dominant — Not Platinum Certified
plain_english_summary: BPC-157 has a substantial preclinical evidence base and now includes directly extracted animal pharmacokinetic and mechanistic evidence in Certiaura. Human evidence remains sparse and insufficiently appraised to establish confirmatory efficacy, a validated universal dosing protocol, or long-term safety.
certification_blockers: Direct methodological appraisal of existing human publications
Primary-source closure for remaining preclinical studies
